Home / Service Areas / San Jose

Demolition contractor in San Jose, CA

Trusted local professionals serving San Jose and surrounding communities

Serving San Jose, CA

Three Star Demolition & Janitorial is proud to offer comprehensive demolition and janitorial services to the vibrant community of San Jose. We understand the unique needs of San Jose residents and businesses, from residential teardowns to commercial building demolitions and post-construction cleanup. Our commitment to safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility makes us the premier choice for demolition services in the heart of Silicon Valley. We are fully licensed and insured, providing peace of mind for every project we undertake. Our experienced team is equipped to handle any demolition project, large or small. We prioritize minimizing disruption to the surrounding community and adhere to all local regulations and permitting requirements. Whether you're planning a home renovation or a large-scale commercial development, trust Three Star Demolition & Janitorial to deliver exceptional results.

San Jose is the largest city in Northern California and the heart of Silicon Valley, known for its booming tech industry and diverse culture.

Demolition contractor Services in San Jose

Residential Demolition

Safe and efficient demolition of houses, garages, and other residential structures.

Learn more →

Commercial Demolition

Expert demolition services for commercial buildings, offices, and retail spaces.

Learn more →

Interior Demolition

Selective interior demolition services for renovations, remodels, and tenant improvements.

Learn more →

Concrete Removal

Professional concrete removal services for driveways, patios, foundations, and more.

Learn more →

Selective Demolition

Targeted demolition services designed to preserve specific parts of a structure.

Learn more →

Janitorial Services

Comprehensive janitorial services for commercial properties in San Jose.

Learn more →
